* fix: #375 — Bug: Plugin auto-detects MiniMax-Text-01 instead of configured MiniMax-M2.5

Read actual model IDs from gateway provider config (models[] array, then
defaultModel/model fields) before falling back to the hardcoded knownDefault
map. Previously minimax always resolved to MiniMax-Text-01 because knownDefault
was checked first and short-circuited the gateway config lookup.

fix: delete stale /data/.env on Railway startup to prevent secret leaks

The old set_env_var tool wrote secrets to /data/.env on the persistent
volume. The agent could read this file via Bash and expose secrets in
chat. Now we delete it on startup since all env vars come from Railway
service config.

fix: prevent Firefox window disappearing on VNC display

Two root causes for the browser panel showing a blank blue background:

1. Openbox had no focusLast rule — when a popup/child window closed
   (OAuth redirect, window.open(), download dialog), Openbox fell back
   to the X11 root window instead of returning focus to Firefox.
   Fix: add <focusLast>yes</focusLast> to the Openbox config.

2. Openbox default keybindings were active — Super+D, A-F4, etc. could
   be triggered accidentally thro

fix: Allow chess moves without promotion

Previously, the chess.js library required a promotion piece to be specified even when no promotion was occurring. This change modifies the API and frontend logic to correctly handle moves without an explicit promotion piece, defaulting to `undefined` when not provided. This resolves issues where moves might fail due to an unnecessary promotion parameter.

fix(polymarket): v12 风控大修 — 收紧策略门槛、止损、熔断机制

核心问题：50.7%胜率+0.68盈亏比导致持续亏损。

策略修复：
- catalyst: 恢复≥2人共识（v10降到1人导致噪声交易）
- reversion: 波动门槛5%→10%，要求24h交易量>$50k
- high_volume: 禁用（高交易量≠有方向性）
- arbitrage: 禁用（标题日期解析不可靠）
- expiry: 确定性门槛0.70→0.80，窗口14天→7天

风控收紧：
- 硬止损: 从连续5次下跌+10%改为直接-5%止损
- 止盈: 从+20%降到+12%（更早锁定利润）
- target_profit: 0.15→0.08（改善盈亏比）
- 最大持仓: 40→15（集中仓位）
- 短线仓位: $40-60→$30-40
- 不再允许1人共识开仓（即使闲置资金多）

新增：
- 每日亏损熔断: 单日亏损>$50或余额5%时停止开仓
- 保守加仓门槛: 50%/60%（原30%/40%）

Two root causes identified for install failure:
1. @hol-org/standards-sdk@0.1.165 depends on @hashgraphonline/standards-sdk

   break resolution on npm@10.8.2 — fix by upgrading npm to latest in CI

scheduler: fix synthesis/original never triggering - weighted random selection

Bug: scheduler.py used strict priority (reply > synthesis > original).
Since reply quota (18-28) never depletes in a week, synthesis and original
actions NEVER got selected. This is why the account had zero original posts.

Fix: replaced if/elif chain with weighted random.choices() based on
remaining quota for each type. With typical quotas (reply=20, synthesis=4,
original=1), the weights are ~13:4:1, so replies stil

feat(backup): support IRSA and Pod Identity for S3 backup credentials

Make S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID and S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY optional in the
s3-backup-credentials Secret. When omitted, rclone uses --s3-env-auth=true
to authenticate via the AWS SDK credential chain (IRSA, Pod Identity,
instance profile).

Add spec.backup.serviceAccountName to allow backup and restore Jobs to
use an IRSA-annotated or Pod Identity-enabled ServiceAccount, enabling
per-tenant scoped IAM roles with automatic credential rotat

bootstrapping, security subsystem setup, and AgentRuntime assembly.

Provides FreebirdBuilder (builder pattern) and FreebirdApp (run handle)
for constructing a fully-wired FreeBird instance from AppConfig.

check_consent returned Ok(()) for both "below threshold" (no prompt) and
"user approved" cases, causing misleading "consent approved by user" logs
and spurious ApprovalGranted audit events for low-risk tools. Introduce
ConsentOutcome enum (NotRequired | Approved) so the caller can distinguish
the two cases and skip logging/auditing when no prompt was shown.

/api/plans, confidence was always 0 (not passed by agents), causing
min_confidence policy checks to deny valid plans. Now auto-inherits
confidence from the associated case when not explicitly provided.

fix: auto-set defaultProfile=chrome when extension connects

Docker containers have no local Chrome browser. When a Chrome extension
connects via the browser bridge, automatically set browser.defaultProfile
to 'chrome' (extension relay profile) so the AI agent uses the relay
instead of trying to launch a non-existent local Chrome.

This fixes 'tab not found' errors where the gateway was using the
'openclaw' profile (local Chrome launcher) by default, even though
the extension relay profile was a

feat: Structural write verification — the anti-hallucination core [v15]

WHY THIS EXISTS:
Frontier models (Gemini, Claude, GPT-4) don't hallucinate tool calls because
tool calls are emitted in a SEPARATE, VALIDATED CHANNEL from text. The model
cannot 'say' it called a tool without the runtime actually executing it.

Galactic AI parses tool calls from free text, which means a model can write
'Done. I've updated SOUL.md' without triggering any tool — and the gateway
has no way to know the file was

feat(memory): add conversation memory and long-term NVS storage

Short-term memory stores conversation turns in a RAM ring buffer
with configurable max messages (CLAW_AI_MEMORY_MAX_MSGS). Long-term
memory persists key-value facts to NVS Flash, injected into the
system prompt for context-aware responses.

Refactors ai_engine to use ai_chat_with_messages() loop and adds
ai_chat_raw() for one-shot calls without memory pollution.

2. Response language unreliable: relied entirely on model following prompt
   instructions, which fails with models that have strong

after fetching, then comments are enriched as a best-effort second pass.

fetched (~17 min), so any restart during that window lost all data.

fix: prevent compaction retry loop on .reset-trust

The post-reset guard in before_llm_call returned tools=[] but kept the
full session history. When the context was large, this triggered
compaction → retry → context_assembled re-detected .reset-trust →
re-set the pending flag → another post-reset guard → more compaction.

Fix:
1. Return minimal messages (just the .reset-trust command) alongside
   tools=[] and a dedicated system prompt. This makes the LLM call
   trivially small — no compaction

When startAssistant() is called multiple times with the same runId,
it was creating duplicate AssistantMessageComponent instances instead
of reusing the existing one. This caused messages to appear twice in
the terminal UI.

The fix checks if a component already exists for the runId before
creating a new one. If it exists, we update its text instead of

fix(gateway): use PowerShell to kill leftover gateway on Windows

execSync runs through cmd.exe which expands %wildcards% as env vars,
breaking WMIC LIKE queries. Use execFileSync with powershell.exe
directly via Get-CimInstance + Stop-Process. Also wait up to 3s for
Windows to release file handles after kill.

feat(gateway): render caddy against gateway network

Use --force-recreate in make deploy stack start

docker compose up -d without --force-recreate skips containers whose
config hash hasn't changed, leaving stale environments from previous
runs. On re-deploy this caused Caddy to keep its old (broken) container
instead of picking up the current .env. Force-recreate ensures every
deploy starts all containers fresh.

fix: prevent duplicate target crash in relay proxy

Root cause: announceTabsToRelay() was re-sending Target.attachedToTarget
for already-known tabs on every poll cycle or reconnect, causing
playwright's CRBrowser._onAttachedToTarget to assert 'Duplicate target'.

Fix:
- Only send Target.attachedToTarget for NEWLY appeared tabs
- Use Target.targetInfoChanged for title/url updates on known tabs
- Filter out all Target.* CDP events from extension forwarding
  (we manage target lifecycle ourselves)

fix: resolve Telegram long-polling timeout mismatch causing persistent failures

teloxide's default HTTP client timeout (17s) was shorter than the configured
polling timeout (30s), causing every long-poll request to fail. Build a custom
HTTP client via teloxide::net::default_reqwest_settings() with timeout =
polling_timeout + configurable buffer (default 10s = 40s total).

v2.5.4: Add libc++_shared.so to fix dlopen failure on Android 16

- Android 16 linker namespace (clns-10) cannot find libc++_shared.so
  unless it is bundled in the APK's jniLibs
- Copied libc++_shared.so from NDK 25.2 aarch64 toolchain to jniLibs/arm64-v8a/

gracefully rather than crash the daemon.

fix: add browserContextId to targetInfo to prevent gateway crash

Playwright's CRBrowser._onAttachedToTarget asserts that
targetInfo.browserContextId exists. Our relay proxy was sending
Target.attachedToTarget events without this field, causing
'Unhandled promise rejection' crashes every ~60s.

Added browserContextId and canAccessOpener to the targetInfo
sent in announceTabsToRelay().

fix(ci): wrap prune-releases deletions in try/catch

The prune-releases and cleanup jobs run in parallel and both delete
tags. When cleanup deletes a tag first, prune-releases hits a 404 on
deleteRef and fails the whole workflow. Wrap both deleteRelease and
deleteRef in try/catch with core.warning, matching the pattern already
used in the cleanup job.

Add swap setup to provision.sh; always show backup cron reminder

Swap: OpenClaw (Node.js) needs ~500-700MB heap on startup. On a 2GB VPS
without swap the OOM killer fires before boot completes. Creates a 2GB
swapfile at /swapfile, persists via /etc/fstab. Idempotent — skips if
swapfile already exists.

Backup cron: setup.sh summary previously only warned when BACKUP_S3_BUCKET
was empty. The cron must be installed regardless of whether S3 is
configured, so now always reminds — with different tex

feat: bridge-to-relay proxy for remote browser control

When Chrome extension connects via web-panel bridge, web-panel now
automatically connects to gateway's extension relay (port 18792) and
translates messages bidirectionally:

- Extension → Bridge → Relay Proxy → Gateway Relay → Gateway
- Gateway → Relay → Relay Proxy → Bridge → Extension → Chrome

This enables gateway AI agents to control remote Chrome browsers
through the existing bridge infrastructure without any changes to
the gateway bin

### What this PR does

Upgrades `@ai-sdk/xai` from 2.0.36 to 2.0.56 and migrates xAI web search
from the deprecated Live Search (provider options) approach to the
Responses API with tool-based web search (`xai.tools.webSearch()` +
`xai.tools.xSearch()`).

Before this PR:
- xAI web search used the deprecated Live Search approach via
`searchParameters` provider options
- No support for xSearch (X/Twitter post search

Before this PR:
`fetchMessagesSummary` accepted an `assistant` parameter and used the
current assistant's settings when generating topic names. When the
current assistant was configured with a model that supports image
generation (e.g., `gemini-3-flash-preview`), its custom parameters such
as `responseModalities: ["IMAGE"]` and `imageConfig` were incorrectly
included in the topic naming request — a pure text task

fix: tailscale daemon 三级启动保障

3. 手动后台 tailscaled

三级都失败才 warn 让用户手动处理。

- 修复同步上游源码时包含 .github/workflows 文件，导致 GitHub 因缺少 workflows 权限拒绝推送的问题
- 版本分支同步时排除 .github/workflows，仅保留源码及注入文件
- 保持 Dockerfile 与 .gitignore 自动注入逻辑不变
- 不影响自动获取最新版本、手动指定版本、latest 标签开关和强制重建功能

close match but the /v1/recall endpoint (which combines vector + keyword
search) would find them. Add a fallback: if retrieve returns zero
results after confidence filtering, retry via client.recall with the
same profile params before giving up.

security(runtime): audit session creation in security log

Records SessionStarted audit event with granted capabilities when a
new conversation is created, closing the gap where session creation
was persisted via EventSink but not recorded in the security audit log.

Fix SKILL.md parser crash on simple script format + singularization bugs

- skillmd_parser: handle scripts-as-strings format (e.g. OilCRM) without crashing
- ui_generator: fix singularize() producing 'leas' from 'leases' (now only strips
  sibilant suffixes: -shes, -ches, -xes, -zes, then generic -s)
- ui_generator: filter variant entities (e.g. 'expiring_lease') that shadow base
  entities with create actions

security(memory): verify HMAC chain integrity on conversation load

Adds verify_on_load config flag (default true) to MemoryConfig. When
enabled, load() verifies the per-session HMAC chain before replaying
events, returning IntegrityViolation on tamper detection. Includes
tests for tampered event detection and verification-disabled bypass.

  (max failover gap reduced from 150s to 45s)

  instance in DB but missing from the local scheduler (fixes bug where
  instance A reassigns jobs to instance B, but B never loads them)

  deferral reason,

fix: heartbeat detection checks only the last user message

Heartbeat detection was using messages.some() which matched if ANY user
message in conversation history contained HEARTBEAT_OK. This caused all
subsequent turns to be falsely tagged as heartbeats once one appeared.

Now checks only the last user message via reverse().find().

results on cold start. Remove the filter — session_dir is already

feat(ops): 双作用域 CI/CD 架构 — 统一管理自身运维与多项目 CI/CD

## 解决问题
CI/CD Agent 需要同时管理两类工作：
1. openclaw-gateway 自身的 CI/CD 与运维（self-scope）
2. 由 OpenClaw 开发的多个客户项目的 CI/CD（project-scope）

原 cron 任务（ops-pr-auto-merge-check、ops-incident-scan）未明确作用域，
导致 Agent 无法区分应扫描哪个仓库，职责混乱。

## 变更内容

### 新增：skills/ops/ci-scope-manager.js（Scope-Aware Dispatcher）
- resolveScope(scope) — 解析 self/project:<id>/all-projects/all 为具体仓库列表
- runScopedPRMergeCheck(scope) — 双作用域 PR 自动合并巡检
- runScopedIncidentScan(scope) — 双作用域故障巡检
- runScop

fix(approval): replace unreachable!() with defensive Denied handling in check_budget

The Denied arm in check_budget was marked unreachable!() because
request_approval_raw already converts Denied to Err. However, if the
contract of request_approval_raw changes, this would panic in production.
Replace with proper error propagation for defensive correctness.

feat(consent): add 4-option budget mode to consent selector UI

When a budget exceeded approval request arrives, the consent selector
now shows four options instead of two:

  > Approve once [1]
    Double limit to 65536 [2]
    Disable limit [3]
    Deny [n]

The selected budget_action is passed through the wire protocol to the
agent, which applies the limit change atomically. This eliminates
approval fatigue from repeated per-turn budget prompts.

fix: avoid SIGPIPE in ip route detection under set -o pipefail

awk 'exit' closed its stdin while ip route was still writing, causing
SIGPIPE (exit 141) which set -o pipefail treated as fatal. Switch to
ip -4 route show default | awk 'NR==1{...}' which reads all input
without early exit.

Follow-up to #472. When `wait=false`, background commit failures were
silently lost — callers had no way to know if memory extraction succeeded.

This adds a lightweight in-memory TaskTracker that returns a `task_id`
on async commit, which callers can poll via new `/tasks` endpoints to
check completion status, results, or errors.

security(memory): escape FTS5 query input to prevent search injection

User-supplied search queries were passed directly to FTS5 MATCH, allowing
FTS5 operators (AND, OR, NOT, column:prefix) to manipulate search results.
Now wraps queries in double-quoted phrase syntax with internal quotes
escaped, treating all input as a literal phrase search.

security(daemon): derive HMAC signing key from passphrase, not salt alone

The signing key was derived solely from the database salt, which is
stored in plaintext on disk. An attacker with filesystem access could
reconstruct the key and forge HMAC chains. Now derives the signing key
via HMAC-SHA256(passphrase, domain_separator|salt), incorporating the
secret passphrase so the key cannot be reconstructed without it.

fix: resolve UI freeze on rapid page navigation

Defer agent enrichment (usage/task merge) via setTimeout(0) with timer
guard to unblock the event loop and coalesce cascading SSE updates.
Use Map lookups to reduce O(n²) to O(n). Fix DataProvider polling
intervals rebuilding on tab switch by using useRef. Stagger agent
model fetches and skip cached ones. Cache SSE EventSource to prevent
duplicate connections. Preserve enriched fields across agent refreshes
to avoid data flicker.

fix: 统一新会话命令并修复未真正清理会话的问题

问题背景：
- 钉钉 Connector 之前在本地通过 isNewSessionCommand 拦截 /new、/reset、/clear、「新会话」等指令。
- 命中后由插件直接回复「✨ 已开启新会话，之前的对话已清空。」这条固定文案，并提前 return，不再往 Gateway 发送消息。
- 实际上 Connector 本身并没有真正清理会话上下文，也没有触发 Gateway 的 session.reset，导致用户以为会话已清空，但后续对话仍然带着旧上下文继续。

本次改动：
- 新增 normalizeSlashCommand 工具方法，将 /new、/reset、/clear、「新会话」「重新开始」「清空对话」等别名统一归一为标准指令 `/new`。
- 在构造 userContent 时，先对文本部分调用 normalizeSlashCommand，再将结果连同图片、本地文件内容一并发送给 Gateway。
- 删除 handleDingTalkMessage 中原有的“本地拦截 + 假提示”逻辑（forceNewS

fix(event-bus): 修复已失败事件仍被 consume() 消费的 P0 Bug

问题：fail() 调用后 retry_count 未达 MAX_RETRY(3) 时 status 维持
'pending'，导致 consume() 无法过滤该模块的失败事件，失败事件被重复消费。

修复方案：引入 failed_by 字段进行逐模块失败追踪。
- fail()：将模块写入 event.failed_by[module]
- consume()：新增 failed_by[module] 存在则跳过的过滤条件

同步修复 MockEventBus（tests/event-bus.test.js），保持测试与生产逻辑一致。

测试结果：43/43 全部通过（修复前 42/43）

docs(audit): 添加多项目开发平台标准审计报告

全面评估 openclaw-gateway 是否达到多项目开发平台标准，覆盖以下 8 个维度：
- 架构设计（7/10）：模块边界清晰、事件驱动、多模型路由，缺容器化
- 多项目管理（8/10）：五级SOP、并行调度、项目隔离完整
- 知识管理（7/10）：三层体系+版本管理，部分领域内容空缺
- 可观测性（5/10）：缺 Metrics/Tracing/集中日志
- 自动化运维（5/10）：缺 CI/CD 流水线和容器化部署
- 安全（6/10）：PRECHECK 协议完整，但凭证硬编码需修复
- 测试（5/10）：存在 1 个 P0 Bug，核心模块测试缺失
- 文档（9/10）：接口契约和 SOP 文档完整

综合得分：52/80（65%）。识别 P0 Bug（event-bus 消费已失败事件）和 P1 安全风险（凭证硬编码），并给出优先级改进建议。

fix(gemini): restore conversation history injection on session rebuild

The `injectHistoryFromDatabase()` method was accidentally emptied in
44452cd3, causing Gemini sessions to lose all conversation context when
re-entered. The worker-side handler (`init.history`) was still intact
but never received data.

Restore the original implementation that reads the last 20 text messages
(up to 4000 chars) from the database and injects them into the worker
via `postMessagePromise('init.history', ...)`.

fix(security): fail-closed for unknown dmPolicy values

Changed DM policy enforcement to use fail-closed instead of fail-open:
- Unknown/invalid dmPolicy values now deny messages instead of allowing
- Prevents configuration errors from opening security holes
- Updated tests to verify secure default behavior

Security Impact:
- Previous: Invalid/corrupted config would allow ALL messages (fail-open)
- Fixed: Invalid/corrupted config now blocks ALL messages (fail-closed)

This is a defense-in-depth
